A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly filtered individual reviews by review.rating >= 4.5 in the review table (call_MbyrRQhcNFPCOtIUuJHp8bq1) instead of first selecting businesses with overall ratings >= 4.5 from business metadata and then counting their 2019 reviews, leading to different top businesses and lower counts.

FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing query (call_EKC2EnrrY4pTO1eZ4j5Gybaf), the agent filtered reviews with "rating >= 4.5" on an integer rating field, effectively counting only 5-star reviews and undercounting high-rating 2019 reviews, which led to the wrong top 3 businesses (e.g., missing Encino Dermatology & Laser).

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s SQL filter CAST(rating AS REAL) >= 4.5 on the review table (where rating is an integer per schema) effectively counted only 5-star reviews, excluding 4.5-star reviews and producing undercounts (e.g., 7 for The Boochyard @ Local Roots instead of 17), leading to an incorrect top 3.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
